title: Pocket Villagers
description: Capture Villagers in Cubes with Compact Villager Automation
body: ### [Please consider supporting me on ko-fi if you like the mod and can afford it, I appreciate even 1 dollar. ](https://ko-fi.com/raguto) --- _**I grant permission to anyone seeking to add my mod to a modpack**_ --- ### **NeoForge Version Requires: [Architectury Api!](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)** and [Forgified Fabric Api!](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api) Also suggests [Mod Menu: Neoforge Edition!](https://modrinth.com/mod/mod-menu-(neoforge-edition)) ### **Fabric Version: No Requirements, But Suggests [Mod Menu!](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)** Pocket Villagers changes how you interact with villagers in Minecraft by allowing you to capture them into convenient portable cubes. Whether you're managing trades, automating farms, or optimizing your village setup, this mod provides powerful tools to streamline every aspect of villager management. --- ## 🎯 Core Features ### Villager Capture System Right-click any villager to capture them into a **Pocket Cube** - a portable item that stores your villager safely. Transport villagers anywhere with ease, no more minecart madness or boat navigation nightmares! ### Smart Trading Interface The main Pocket Cube comes packed with trading enhancements: - **Exhaustion Prevention** - Trade without worrying about villagers locking their trades - **Manual Refresh Button** - Refresh trades on demand - **Auto Refresher** - Set search terms (like "mending", "sharpness", etc.) and automatically refresh trades until your desired enchantment appears- ### 📦 Storage Pocket Cube Need to manage multiple villagers at once? The **Storage Pocket Cube** can hold up to **10 villagers** simultaneously! - **Mass Storage** - Capture and transport up to 10 villagers in a single item - **Terminal Integration** - Acts as the primary storage interface for Pocket Terminal transfers - **Bulk Management** - Perfect for organizing your villager collection - **Flexible Distribution** - Easily distribute villagers to different automation cubes via the Pocket Terminal - **Baby Auto-Transfer** - If placed next to a breeder pocket cube, babies that grow to 100% automatically transfer --- ## 🖥️ Pocket Terminal The **Pocket Terminal** is your central command center for managing all your villager cubes! ### Centralized Management Place a Pocket Terminal anywhere in your base, and it will automatically detect all cubes within a **64-block radius**. View and manage your entire villager network from one convenient location. ### Seamless Villager Transfer Transfer villagers between cubes through an intuitive GUI - no need to release villagers back into the world! Simply select a villager and move them to any connected cube with a few clicks. ### Key Benefits: - **64-Block Detection Radius** - Covers large areas of your base - **Beautiful GUI** - Clean, easy-to-use interface for managing your villagers - **Direct Transfers** - Move villagers cube-to-cube instantly - **Never Release Villagers** - Keep everything contained and organized - **Perfect for Large Setups** - Manage dozens of cubes from a single terminal --- ## 🧪 Converter Cube Transform your villagers with the **Converter Cube**: - **Zombification** - Convert villagers to zombie villagers - **Curing** - Cure zombie villagers back to normal - Perfect for obtaining discounted trades through the cure discount mechanic --- ## ⚙️ Automation Cubes ### 🛒 Auto Trader Cube Automatically executes trades with captured villagers. Perfect for bulk trading operations and resource generation. ### 💚 Breeder Cube Handles villager breeding automatically. Maintain optimal population levels without manual intervention. ### ⚒️ Iron Farm Cube Automated iron production using captured villagers. Set it and forget it! ### ⛏️ Mining Cube Let your villagers do the mining work for you. Automated resource gathering at your fingertips. ### 🌾 Farming Cube Automate crop farming with villager-powered agriculture. Keep your food supplies stocked effortlessly. ### 🎣 Fishing Cube Automated fishing operations. Collect fish, treasures, and more while you focus on other tasks. --- ## 💡 Why Pocket Villagers? - **Convenience** - No more villager transportation headaches - **Automation** - Set up self-sustaining systems for all your needs - **Efficiency** - Get the trades you want without endless rerolling - **Flexibility** - Mix and match cubes to create your perfect setup - **Also no good option on fabric** Easy Villagers is not available on fabric so I made this mod instead! Secret Feature: Right-click villagers holding a workstation to instantly job them, no more placing the station down and waiting for them to claim it. --- Compatibility Mods: [Visible Traders](https://modrinth.com/mod/visible-traders) [MoreVillagers - Re Employed](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-villagers-re-employed) [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)
